title: Independent autonomous-v1 contract security review
goal: Perform an independent adversarial review of AgentBounty, AgentBountyFactory, interfaces, planners, decoder, and indexer before unrestricted activation.
acceptance_criteria: Add a repository-grounded threat model covering token behavior, EIP-712, ERC-1271, EIP-3009 replay, quorum collusion, timeout and refund accounting, CREATE2 identity, reentrancy, and creator/solver separation.
Add a severity-ranked findings report with exploit preconditions and concrete remediations.
Add Foundry regression tests for every confirmed finding or document why it is non-executable.
forge test --fuzz-runs 10000 passes after accepted fixes.
The solver and PR author do not verify their own work.

verification_policy.rubric: Both verifier agents must independently confirm every acceptance criterion and all required deterministic checks from public evidence. Either may reject; only matching signatures settle.
